responsibilities: Determine which lenses need another pass after plan edits or synthesis decisions.
Preserve passing_locked and converged_locked lenses unless the target changed in their domain.
Mark stale or superseded outputs when target revisions no longer match.
Stop rerun churn caused by repeated non-material findings.
validation_rules: Reruns require accepted material findings, score-lowering gaps, domain-relevant target changes, or explicit user request.
Locked lenses must not rerun without a domain-relevant change or explicit user request.
A review cannot complete while any spawned reviewer remains non-terminal or unclosed.
